resources.name: canopy-amazon-categories
resources.title: Canopy Amazon categories
resources.description: Returns the root Amazon product category taxonomy using Canopy's default US domain.

resources.name: canopy-amazon-deals
resources.title: Canopy Amazon deals
resources.description: Returns current Amazon deals using Canopy's default US domain and default paging.

resources.title: Canopy Amazon best sellers
